news.t: Strategas Asset Management's ETF Family Marks One-Year Anniversary; Surpasses $100 Million in Total Assets

holdings.infoBox: SAGP is an equity ETF with a total of 106 individual holdings. The top holdings are Teradyne stock at 2.24%, Stanley Black & Decker at 2.08%, Chipotle Mexican Grill at 2.04%, General Dynamics at 2.03%, and A. O. Smith at 2.01%.

overview.description: The Strategas Global Policy Opportunities ETF (SAGP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in various global stocks engaged in lobbying activities with the US federal government. SAGP was launched on Jan 24, 2022 and is issued by Strategas.

data.title: Strategas Asset Management's ETF Family Marks One-Year Anniversary; Surpasses $100 Million in Total Assets
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Strategas Asset Management is today marking the one-year anniversary of the launch of its Strategas Macro Thematic Opportunities ETF (SAMT) and Strategas Global Policy Opp...
